history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade failed because ResponseEntity.getStatusCode() now returns HttpStatusCode instead of HttpStatus, causing type mismatch compilation errors.
history.qwen_rationale: The observation library match identifies this as a known Spring 6 widening change. Folding the WidenHttpStatusToHttpStatusCode recipe into the upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 step will update variable declarations from HttpStatus to HttpStatusCode, resolving the type incompatibility.
